hero.name: Lynne
hero.p1: Helping Web3 projects achieve growth through data-driven social media strategies, community building, and cross-platform marketing campaigns.

socialCases.title: Social Media Operation Cases
socialCases.subtitle: Deeply engaged in the Web3 and B2B fields, developing multi-dimensional methodologies for social media growth and conversion.

about.title: Who's behind all this
about.p1: I'm always curious about new things, and in a high-intensity work rhythm, I focus on growth while exploring content, technology, and various new approaches.

experience.title: 1+ years of Web3 experience
experience.desc: Although I only have over a year of Web3 experience, I've tried, stumbled, and learned from most of it.

followers.title: Managed 110K+ followers
followers.desc: Mainly for Twitter project accounts, from cold starts to stable growth.

campaigns.title: Ran 30+ campaigns
campaigns.desc: From AMAs, airdrops, to partnership events, I've run through the whole process from planning to execution.

events.title: Excitedly started AI programming and launched my personal website
Started seriously using AI (ChatGPT / Gemini) with Lark Base to maximize work efficiency
Published my first post about Web3, becoming a blogger on Xiaohongshu & Twitter

caseDetail.projectJump: Click the buttons below to quickly jump to the corresponding project details:

Twitter.title: Twitter (X) Operation Cases
Twitter.summary: Deeply engaged in the Web3 field, achieving explosive growth for Ads3.ai and Claw Intelligence through AI-driven strategies and ecosystem partnerships.

background.positioning: Bringing 1 billion social network users into Web3, helping crypto projects, GameFi, and dApps achieve cross-ecosystem explosive growth through AI-powered precise advertising and multi-dimensional traffic aggregation.

stats.label: On-chain User Growth
stats.desc: Top DApp on BNB Chain in 30 days

articles.title: 1. Account Growth & Brand Positioning
articles.content: Successfully established the image of a leader in 'AI-driven Web3 smart advertising'. By releasing a landscape of 200+ partners covering core sectors like Exchange, Infra, AI, and Gaming, Ads3 was established as an authority in Web3 traffic aggregation.

articles.title: 2. Strategic Partner BD & Ecosystem Expansion
articles.content: Led and executed announcements for 200+ high-value partners. For example, the strategic partnership with Fomoin significantly improved partner acquisition efficiency and brand exposure through AI-driven precision targeting.

articles.title: 3. Campaign Planning & Community Operation
articles.content: Planned and hosted several industry-benchmark events. The 'AI, Data & Smart Growth in Web3' Twitter Space AMA attracted thousands of listeners, inviting top industry experts to discuss new paradigms of Web3 growth.

articles.title: 4. Direct Contribution to On-chain Growth
articles.content: With excellent traffic distribution capabilities, helped Ads3 top the dApp rankings on the opBNB chain. Achieved 300K+ user growth and 301K+ transactions in 30 days, proving the platform's practical power.

articles.title: 5. In-depth Case Studies & Technical Output
articles.content: Published multiple in-depth case studies detailing how AI algorithms optimize acquisition paths, successfully reducing project CPA by 4x. This professional content greatly boosted B2B client conversion confidence.

background.positioning: Aggregating market data and on-chain signals through an AI Agent + MCP protocol to help Web3 users achieve a smart trading loop of 'data → insight → one-click execution'.

articles.title: 1. Strategic Partner BD & Ecosystem Expansion
articles.content: Led several high-value partner announcements to quickly build an on-chain intelligent ecosystem network.
articles.highlightText: Example: Exciting partnership alert: Chain Intelligence × DataVLT!

articles.title: 2. Investor Backing & Investment Promotion
articles.content: Successfully promoted the strategic investment from Castrum Capital, enhancing project credibility.

articles.title: 3. Building Industry Influence
articles.content: Participated as a guest in a major Ads3.ai AMA, positioning as a professional voice in the Web3 AI smart growth field.

articles.title: 4. Product Iteration & Content Strategy
articles.content: Continuously promoted product features (like Isolated Sandbox) using a combined strategy of 'partners + investment + industry trends'.

Telegram.title: Telegram Community Operations
Telegram.summary: Responsible for the growth and conversion of the official Ads3 community, building a highly active Web3 community through campaign mechanism design and conversion path optimization.

background.positioning: Community Type: Airdrop Community + Official Project Community. Core Goals: Acquisition + Engagement + Conversion.

articles.title: Ads3 Airdrop Alliance Relay Campaign
articles.content: Planned a 15-day joint relay race, achieving 17.2k views, +8,000 participants, and a 20%+ referral rate.

articles.title: BNB & Ads3 Airdrop Campaign
articles.content: A single campaign achieved 19k views, 5,000+ participants, and directly drove +1,200 user registrations.

LinkedIn.title: LinkedIn B2B Operations
LinkedIn.summary: Responsible for TopOn's account content operations and growth strategy, building a B2B content system around mobile ad monetization to achieve both brand exposure and customer acquisition.

background.positioning: Brand Exposure + B2B Lead Generation + Product Education, targeting game developers, app developers, and global teams.

articles.title: 🏆 Case 1: Award Promotion (High Brand Exposure)
articles.content: Promoted TopOn's GTC Award, resulting in +80% higher exposure than average, effectively enhancing industry trust.

articles.title: 🎄 Case 2: Holiday Marketing (High Engagement)
articles.content: The Christmas Campaign saw a +60% increase in engagement rate, successfully adding 'emotional value' to B2B content.

articles.title: 🚀 Case 3: Feature Launch (High Conversion)
articles.content: Launched the Incentivized Anti-Fraud feature, leading to a +35% CTR increase and a significant rise in lead conversions.

WeChat.title: WeChat Official Account Ops
WeChat.summary: Responsible for TopOn's official account content operations, achieving brand communication and private traffic conversion through a structured content system and topic strategy.

background.positioning: Brand Promotion + Industry Content + User Education + Conversion Funnel, targeting global developers and ad monetization professionals.

articles.title: 🌏 Case 2: Market Insights (Content Series)
articles.content: 'Exploring the Indonesian Game Market: Unlocking Infinite Potential,' strengthening TopOn's positioning as a 'global market expert'.
